stories.title: D11 Chronic Absenteeism Surges — Largest Jump Among Large Colorado Districts

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
D11 had the biggest chronic absenteeism spike of any large Colorado district: 16.6 points in one year.

Over half of Black and Hispanic students are now chronically absent.

d11.org #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Chronically absent = missing 10% or more of school days.

In D11, that number jumped 16.6 points in one year.

Resources for families at d11.org. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: D11's Chronic Absenteeism Surged More Than Any Large Colorado District — Here's What Families Can Do

stories.title: CPSC Recalls Two Amazon Baby Bath Seats — Drowning and Entrapment Risk

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
🛁 Two Amazon baby bath seats recalled — drowning risk.

YCXXKJ (by BenTalk): unstable, can tip, drowning hazard.
NFSVLB (ZY2025, ~1,430 units): tips over, entrapment hazard.

Stop use. Check cpsc.gov. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
NFSVLB Baby Bath Seat (Model ZY2025) recall: disassemble the seat, cut the suction cups, email a photo to get your refund.

Contact: amzmaihuayd@163.com

Full recall at cpsc.gov. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: CPSC Recalls Two Amazon Baby Bath Seats for Drowning Risk — Stop Using Now

stories.title: Vevor Baby Swings Recalled — Stop Using Immediately (Suffocation Risk)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
⚠️ Recall: Vevor Baby Swings (BB501K, BB702A, BB005K). ~1,020 units sold Jan–Aug 2025, $65–$80.

Inclined sleeper ban violation. Suffocation risk. Stop using now.

Get refund: recalling@vevor.com or 855-599-6320. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Vevor Baby Swings Recalled for Suffocation Risk — Models BB501K, BB702A, BB005K

stories.title: COS Earth Day and Spring Nature Programs at Fountain Creek

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Two Fountain Creek programs this week:

Apr 24 (2–4 PM): Habitat Exploration, grades 3–6, $4/person
Apr 25 (10 AM–12 PM): Earth Day, $5/person

Prepaid registration required. Call 719-520-6745. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Fountain Creek Spring Programs for Families: Habitat Exploration April 24 and Earth Day April 25

stories.title: AAP Updates School Food Allergy Guidelines — What Colorado Springs Families Should Know

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Up to 10% of kids have food allergies. Anaphylaxis happens in 1 in 15 schools per year.

AAP 2025 update: ask your pediatrician about a stock epinephrine prescription for your kid's school.

aap.org #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: AAP Updates School Food Allergy Guidelines — What Colorado Springs Families Should Know
